'''Terrlarn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] active some time before the outbreak of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was the first notable kill by the [[Tiss'shar]] [[Gunslinger/Legends|gunslinger]] [[Uul-Rha-Shan]].

==History==
Terrlarn, a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]], was a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] with a reputation as unbeatable. When he attempted to bully his employer on [[Port Haven/Legends|Port Haven]] and steal a load of [[Tagge Company/Legends|Tagge Company]] [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] [[Blaster power pack/Legends|cartridges]], the [[Tiss'shar]] [[Gunslinger/Legends|gunslinger]] [[Uul-Rha-Shan]] intervened. Outdrawing the Gotal mercenary, the Tiss'shar shot and killed Terrlarn, leaving his body on the beach.<ref name="Uncivilized" />

In the aftermath of Terrlarn's death, Uul-Rha-Shan discovered that killing prominent rivals increased the demand for his services. This led him to build his reputation by killing several other gunslingers for a series of apparently trivial reasons: a career path which resulted in a position as [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] to [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] [[Viceprex/Legends|Viceprex]] [[Mirkovig Hirken]].<ref name="Uncivilized" />

A picture of Terrlarn illustrated the Gotal entry in an updated edition of [[Shi'ido]] [[Sentientologist|anthropologist]] [[Mammon Hoole]]'s reference work, [[The Essential Guide to Alien Species|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species''.]]<ref name="NEGAS">''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]''</ref><ref name="Senate Hall post">Ed Erdelac, [[Forum:SH Archive/Unidentified Gotal Mercenary]] on [[Wookieepedia]]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[Edward M. Erdelac|Ed Erdelac]], the author of ''[[So Uncivilized: Great Gunslingers in Star Wars]]'' on the [[Star Wars Blog|official ''Star Wars'' Blog]], has retroactively identified Terrlarn with the Gotal Mercenary miniature in ''[[Legacy of the Force (Star Wars Miniatures)|Star Wars Miniatures: Legacy of the Force]]'', and with the previously unnamed Gotal pictured in an illustration by [[Chris Trevas]] in ''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]''.<ref name="Senate Hall post" />
